title: Valentine's Blessing
description: Mod enhancing empty looking waters with colorful blooming lilypads and adds Valentine's day decorations.
body:
![Valentine's Blessing](https://i.imgur.com/bWV7G29.png)

A mod enhancing empty-looking waters with colorful blooming lilypads and adding Valentine's Day themed decorations.

Lilypads spawn in certain waters according to their color:
- Light ones (pink, lilac) appear in rivers  
- Bright ones (blue, magenta, tropical red) enhance swamps  
- White lilypads enrich icy rivers  

All other blocks and items included are craftable using vanilla resources.

More information, performance tips, and recipes are available here:  
**[Valentine's Blessing Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1axU0a9bnuPWEeSuIcWWaCtB8aL9ogAjE/view?usp=sharing)**

### Lilypads have been discontinued and moved to a new project found here: **[Lily Pads Expansion](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lily-pads-expansion)**


*If your world was already generated, lilypads will only spawn in newly generated chunks — simply explore further.*  
*When placing a lilypad, make sure there is no seagrass directly underneath it.*

## Content

- Large wedding-style cakes  
- Rose wall decorations in multiple colors  
- Enchanted love cookie with healing properties  

![Valentine's Blessing examples](https://i.imgur.com/muFudL8.png)

*Tip 1: To build a decorative rose fence, use placeholder blocks to shape it, place your decorations, then remove them.*  
*Tip 2: Collect roses 🌹*

### Please do not redistribute this mod, re-uploading it to other websites is not permitted.
